violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knife) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved knife to 3 bay sink to washed, rinse and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Observed water clogged in floor drain under 3-bay sink in bar area. A PLUMBING SYSTEM shall be maintained in good repair. Service order placed at time of inspection. Schedule to be service today. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The grout on the floor in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, work order has previously been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (tomato, lettuce, bread) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. PIC voluntarily disposed of sandwich items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Hand wash sinks were observed being used as dump sinks. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New sanitizer was installed and dish machine was ran until proper concentration was achieved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The following utensils were observed improperly stored (on unclean surfaces) between uses: 1) Knife stored between units 2) Spatulas stored under equipment 3) Chip scoop stored on top equipment 4) Tongs stored in stagnant water Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The hood vents above the cook lines had grease build up 2) The fan covers in the walk-in had biofilm 3) The vents of the lettuce storage equipment had dust build up New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The doors to the chip unit are missing. The units must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, doors have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The grout on the floor in the ware-washing area/soup hot hold area was observed in poor repair and was allowing water to pool. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
